name: Mother's Scotch Shortbread (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix butter and sugar until creamy. Add sifted dry ingredients.
3. Chill until easy to handle.
4. Roll out to 1/4-inch thickness on lightly-floured board or wax paper.
5. Cut into desired shapes (e.g., bird cutter, Christmas tree).
6. Bake on ungreased sheet at 325°F for 10 to 15 minutes.
7. Cookies may be sprinkled with colored sugars before baking, if desired.
